source_pr.title: ddl: Pass go race
source_pr.body: Fix the problem about using transaction asynchronously in reorgContext.

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky under the race detector because the DDL hook callback (`onJobUpdated`) runs in another goroutine and reused shared variables (e.g., context), causing a data race when checks were executed. This PR stabilizes it by creating a fresh context inside the callback before performing the state checks.
fix_pattern: Avoid sharing mutable variables/contexts across async DDL hook goroutines; create per-callback context (or guard shared state with synchronization) before assertions.
